svg.title: Image variant build tooling comparison
svg.desc: Flowchart showing which image processing tool to pick based on your stack: Sharp for Node scripts, framework plugins for Vite/Next/Astro/Eleventy, or CDN for no-build workflows

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me a Sharp script to generate srcset image variants')
sendPrompt('Which image plugin should I use for my framework?')
sendPrompt('How does a CDN image transformation service work for srcset?')
sendPrompt('Show me a full Sharp script for WebP and AVIF variants')
sendPrompt('How does Next.js next/image optimize images automatically?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up vite-imagetools for srcset generation?')
sendPrompt('How does Astro handle responsive image generation?')
sendPrompt('Which Eleventy image plugin should I use?')
sendPrompt('What output files does Sharp generate and where do they go?')
sendPrompt('How does Astro or Next.js serve optimized images at build time?')
sendPrompt('What is the URL format for Cloudinary or Imgix image transforms?')
sendPrompt('What formats should I always output — WebP, AVIF, or JPEG?')
g.text: All paths → output WebP + AVIF + JPEG fallback
serve via <picture> with type= on each <source>
